rule_details.description: org.springframework.lang.Nullable no longer supported in actuator endpoint parameters in Spring Boot 4
Liveness and readiness probes are now enabled by default in Spring Boot 4
RabbitRetryTemplateCustomizer replaced by RabbitTemplateRetrySettingsCustomizer and RabbitListenerRetrySettingsCustomizer
spring-boot-starter-batch now uses in-memory mode by default; use spring-boot-starter-batch-jdbc for database persistence
BootstrapRegistry moved from org.springframework.boot to org.springframework.boot.bootstrap
BootstrapContext moved from org.springframework.boot to org.springframework.boot.bootstrap
EnvironmentPostProcessor moved from org.springframework.boot.env to org.springframework.boot
Embedded executable uber jar launch scripts removed in Spring Boot 4.0.
Classic uber-jar loader configuration removed from Spring Boot 4 Maven plugin
Classic uber-jar loader configuration removed from Spring Boot 4 Gradle plugin
CycloneDX Gradle plugin requires minimum version 3.0.0 for Spring Boot 4 compatibility
PropertyMapper.alwaysApplyingWhenNonNull() removed in Spring Boot 4
Spring Boot 4.0 requires Java 17, Kotlin 2.2+, GraalVM 25+, Servlet 6.1, and Spring Framework 7.x.
Undertow support removed in Spring Boot 4.0 due to Servlet 6.1 incompatibility.
Pulsar Reactive support removed in Spring Boot 4.0; reactor support was dropped from Spring Pulsar.
Spring Session Hazelcast support removed from Spring Boot 4.0; now under Hazelcast team leadership.
Spring Session MongoDB support removed from Spring Boot 4.0; now under MongoDB team leadership.
Spring Boot's Spock integration removed in 4.0; Spock does not yet support Groovy 5.
Flyway now requires spring-boot-starter-flyway instead of direct flyway-core dependency
Liquibase now requires spring-boot-starter-liquibase instead of direct liquibase-core dependency
spring-boot-starter replaced by spring-boot-starter-classic for quick migration to Spring Boot 4
spring-boot-starter-aop renamed to spring-boot-starter-aspectj in Spring Boot 4
Spring Retry no longer has dependency management in Spring Boot 4; explicit version required
spring-graphql-test replaced by spring-boot-starter-graphql-test in Spring Boot 4
spring-boot-starter-aop renamed to spring-boot-starter-aspectj; check if @Aspect usage requires the renamed starter
DevTools Live Reload is now disabled by default in Spring Boot 4
elasticsearch-rest-client module removed; replaced by co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java
elasticsearch-rest-client-sniffer removed; sniffer support now built into co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java
RestClientBuilderCustomizer replaced by Rest5ClientBuilderCustomizer for new Elasticsearch Rest5Client
hibernate-jpamodelgen replaced by hibernate-processor
hibernate-proxool no longer published; remove from dependencies
hibernate-vibur no longer published; remove from dependencies
Jackson 3 package namespace changed from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson
JsonObjectSerializer renamed to ObjectValueSerializer in Spring Boot 4
JsonValueDeserializer renamed to ObjectValueDeserializer in Spring Boot 4
Jackson2ObjectMapperBuilderCustomizer renamed to JsonMapperBuilderCustomizer in Spring Boot 4
@JsonComponent annotation renamed to @JacksonComponent in Spring Boot 4
@JsonMixin annotation renamed to @JacksonMixin in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.read.* properties moved to spring.jackson.json.read in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.write.* properties moved to spring.jackson.json.write in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.parser.* properties replaced with spring.jackson.json.read in Spring Boot 4
Jackson now auto-registers all classpath modules by default in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.use-jackson2-defaults is a Spring Boot 4-only property for Jackson 2 compatibility mode
StreamBuilderFactoryBeanCustomizer removed; use Spring Kafka's StreamsBuilderFactoryBeanConfigurer
spring.kafka.retry.topic.backoff.random removed; use spring.kafka.retry.topic.backoff.jitter
Logback default charset harmonized to UTF-8 for file and console logs in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.additional-hosts renamed to spring.mongodb.additional-hosts in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.authentication-database renamed to spring.mongodb.authentication-database in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.database renamed to spring.mongodb.database in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.host renamed to spring.mongodb.host in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.password renamed to spring.mongodb.password in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.port renamed to spring.mongodb.port in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.protocol renamed to spring.mongodb.protocol in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.replica-set-name renamed to spring.mongodb.replica-set-name in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.ssl.bundle renamed to spring.mongodb.ssl.bundle in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.ssl.enabled renamed to spring.mongodb.ssl.enabled in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.uri renamed to spring.mongodb.uri in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.username renamed to spring.mongodb.username in Spring Boot 4
management.health.mongo.enabled renamed to management.health.mongodb.enabled in Spring Boot 4
management.metrics.mongo.command.enabled renamed to management.metrics.mongodb.command.enabled in Spring Boot 4
management.metrics.mongo.connectionpool.enabled renamed to management.metrics.mongodb.connectionpool.enabled in Spring Boot 4
Spring Data MongoDB no longer provides defaults for UUID representations; explicit config required
Spring Framework null-safety annotations replaced by JSpecify annotations in Spring Boot 4
@EntityScan moved to org.springframework.boot.persistence.autoconfigure in Spring Boot 4
spring.dao.exceptiontranslation.enabled property removed; use spring.persistence.exceptiontranslation.enabled
spring-boot-starter-oauth2-authorization-server renamed to spring-boot-starter-security-oauth2-authorization-server
spring-boot-starter-oauth2-client renamed to spring-boot-starter-security-oauth2-client
spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server renamed to spring-boot-starter-security-oauth2-resource-server
spring-authorization-server.version property no longer works in Spring Boot 4; use spring-security.version
spring.session.redis.* properties renamed to spring.session.data.redis in Spring Boot 4
spring.session.mongodb.* properties renamed to spring.session.data.mongodb in Spring Boot 4
@WithMockUser and @WithUserDetails now require spring-boot-starter-security-test to operate properly
@WithMockUser requires spring-boot-starter-security-test starter in Spring Boot 4
@WithUserDetails requires spring-boot-starter-security-test starter in Spring Boot 4
spring-boot-starter-test now brought transitively; use technology-specific test starters instead
MockitoTestExecutionListener removed; use MockitoExtension from Mockito instead
@SpringBootTest no longer provides MockMVC support; add @AutoConfigureMockMvc explicitly
TestRestTemplate moved to org.springframework.boot.resttestclient package in Spring Boot 4
@PropertyMapping annotation relocated to org.springframework.boot.test.context package
PropertyMapping.Skip enum relocated to org.springframework.boot.test.context.PropertyMapping.Skip
@MockBean removed; use @MockitoBean from Spring Framework instead
@SpyBean removed; use @MockitoSpyBean from Spring Framework instead
spring-boot-starter-web deprecated in favor of spring-boot-starter-webmvc
spring-boot-starter-web-services deprecated in favor of spring-boot-starter-webservices
FONTS location added to StaticResourceLocation common locations in Spring Boot 4
HttpMessageConverters is deprecated in Spring Boot 4; use ClientHttpMessageConvertersCustomizer/ServerHttpMessageConvertersCustomizer
server.forward-headers-strategy=FRAMEWORK no longer works for WAR deployments in Spring Boot 4
Spring Boot 4 supports Jersey 4.0 which does not support Jackson 3; Jackson 2 module required
WAR deployments must switch from spring-boot-starter-tomcat to spring-boot-starter-tomcat-runtime in Spring Boot 4
